Try This Today: Next time you prompt, add two quick examples before your request. Instead of write a follow-up message, try this: Here are two messages I like: [paste two short examples]. Now write a follow-up in this style. That's it. You'll see the difference immediately.

Keep Going: Every example you give the AI gets you closer to exactly what you need. Start small, and you'll stop wasting time on vague replies. (3/4)

record.text: The Fix: Show, don't just tell. Instead of asking the AI to write a professional email, give it two or three short examples of what you actually want. This is called few-shot learning. You're handing the AI a cheat sheet so it understands your tone, style, and intent right away. (2/4)
